name: Zara Morn
title: Frontier Captain
personality: Zara holds the frontier the way a roof holds a storm — by stubbornness.
appearance: Forty, dust-tanned, leather coat, repeating rifle slung over the shoulder.
background: Held the line through three frontier incursions. Hasn't slept eight hours in a year.

narrative_context.secret: Zara has noticed lattice-Crucible scouts probing her perimeter.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Open a back-channel with Emer Voss; mutual perimeter watch.

name: Hane Okra
title: Frontier Smith
personality: Hane has fixed every rifle on the frontier at least twice.
appearance: Fifties, broad, soot-streaked, leather apron, hands that don't shake.

narrative_context.secret: Hane learned forging from Rina Calvex's master — they don't know each other.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring them together; lattice alloy comes to the frontier.

name: Oren Voss
title: Frontier Trader
personality: Oren tells the truth about distance and lies about price.
appearance: Forty, dusty linen, fingerless gloves, ledger always in hand.
background: Runs supplies between the frontier and the hub. Has been robbed twice and survived both.

narrative_context.secret: Oren has a customer in the hub Bazaar who pays for off-ledger frontier goods.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose the route; Velka and the frontier both take losses.

name: Jensa Bell
title: Frontier Healer
personality: Jensa is patient with the frontier's casualties and impatient with the frontier's politics.
appearance: Thirties, copper hair pinned back, leather satchel, dust-coloured smock.
background: Trained in the hub infirmary. Came west to be useful.

narrative_context.secret: Jensa receives Pia Thalis's smuggled satchels.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Cut the chain; the frontier loses its only steady supply of refugee medicine.

name: Pell Orange
title: Frontier Scout
personality: Pell trusts the dust more than the bunkhouse.
appearance: Late twenties, sun-baked, leather hood, repeating rifle and tracking-knife.
background: Has tracked the lattice-Crucible scouts twice and let them go each time.

narrative_context.secret: Pell saw an impossible print at the western perimeter. Same as Kiren and Brann and Emer.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Four-scout cross-world chain unlocks the print's source.

name: Dust Rose
title: Frontier Foundling
personality: Ten years old. Knows the dust patterns by smell.
appearance: Small, dirty, eyes too bright, leather cap.
background: Showed up at the militia camp three years ago. Refuses to say from where.

narrative_context.secret: Dust Rose crossed from sovereign-ruins through a bog road she remembers but can't explain.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Trace her path; the cross-world bog opens.

name: Mara Pin
title: Frontier Councillor
personality: Mara writes letters. Many letters. Some get read.
appearance: Fifty, prim, grey braid, half-rim spectacles, three pencils in the breast pocket.
background: Elected on a platform of writing letters and refusing the militia's worse ideas.

narrative_context.secret: Mara corresponds with Elder Mira Lattice (hub) about frontier autonomy.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the correspondence surfaces, frontier secession becomes plausible.

name: Silas Quinn
title: Long Rider
personality: Silas rides further than anyone, says less than anyone, drinks more than most.
appearance: Forty, sun-darkened, dust-streaked coat, two pistols at the hip.
background: Has ridden between the frontier and the hub for twenty years.

narrative_context.secret: Silas knows a portal that opens off-schedule on the frontier's western perimeter — same as Kel Sandren's hub anomaly.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Cross-reference Silas and Kel; the cross-world breach is fully traced.
